commands.notes: GitHub feedback loop, PR automation, and PR governance regression tests passed locally.
Repository PR governance template check passed.
Inheritance contract doc check passed without forcing backend drift verification for docs-only changes.
Synthetic pull_request payload confirms the PR body satisfies the governance validator.

affectedSubgraph: pull_request -> governance scripts -> quality/security workflows -> required checks
graphChecks.notes: Repository governance wiring spans feedback classification/apply scripts, PR automation prereqs, and scoped quality gates.

runtimeGap: This patch does not exercise product runtime flows locally; the change stays at repository-governance and quality-gate composition level.
knownGaps: Current repo baseline still has shared backend drift against pantheon-base, but this docs-governance patch no longer treats documentation-only inheritance edits as drift-blocking by themselves.
Current frontend build gate and system smoke suite expose pre-existing repo baseline debt not addressed by this governance-only PR.
Current repository duplication baseline is above the long-term threshold; the duplication gate remains report-only for PRs and merge_group.
